sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36972" key="e(ca/stixos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξά-στῐχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n36972.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of six lines,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σχῆμα</foreign> Sch.D.T.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.191H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
